stage1_txt2img.description: Generate initial character from text description

stage2_multiview.description: Generate multiple views from initial image

front_view.prompt_suffix: front view, facing camera, full body portrait, standing pose, neutral expression
front_view.negative_suffix: side view, back view, profile, turned away

side_profile.prompt_suffix: side profile view, 90 degree angle, full body, standing pose, clean profile silhouette
side_profile.negative_suffix: front view, back view, facing camera, three-quarter view

three_quarter.prompt_suffix: three-quarter view, 45 degree angle, full body, dynamic pose, detailed features
three_quarter.negative_suffix: front view, side view, back view, straight on

back_view.prompt_suffix: back view, rear angle, full body, standing pose, showing back details
back_view.negative_suffix: front view, side view, facing camera, profile

close_up.prompt_suffix: close-up portrait, head and shoulders, detailed facial features, high detail
close_up.negative_suffix: full body, distant view, wide shot, multiple people

prompt_templates.base_character_prompt: {character_description}, high quality, detailed, professional artwork, consistent character design
prompt_templates.negative_base: blurry, low quality, inconsistent, multiple people, deformed, {view_negative}
prompt_templates.style_consistency: same character, consistent appearance, matching outfit, identical person
